title: Smoothie
description: A modpack that makes minecraft feel a lot more smoother.
body:
This is a basic modpack that focuses on making minecraft feel smoother, by adding some optimisation mods (such as Sodium, Lithium, etc.), mods that adds animations (such as Chunks fade in, ChatAnimations, etc.), and other QoL mods (such as ToolTip Fix, Better Ping Display, etc.)

Vanilla:
Average: 85 fps,
Top: 100 fps

Smoothie:
Average: 195 fps,
Top: 205 fps

(Tests were preformed using the same settings)
